### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Security](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Security.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Security')

## EventStorePayloadProtectionMetadata Class

Provider-neutral protection metadata describing how an event payload or snapshot state was transformed\.

```csharp
public sealed record EventStorePayloadProtectionMetadata : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Security.EventStorePayloadProtectionMetadata>
```

### Properties

| Property | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `State` | The protection state: `Unprotected`, `Protected`, or `ProviderOpaque`\. |
| `MetadataVersion` | The metadata schema version\. Current version is `1`\. |
| `Scheme` | Optional provider-neutral scheme identifier\. Required when `State == Protected`\. |
| `KeyAlias` | Optional non-secret key reference alias\. |
| `ContentHint` | Optional content-type or serialization hint\. |
| `CompatibilityFlags` | Optional bounded forward-compatibility flags\. |

### Methods

| Method | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `Unprotected(PayloadProtectionState)` | Creates a current-version no-op metadata record\. |
| `ProviderOpaque(string?)` | Creates a current-version provider-opaque metadata record\. |
